programs.title: The Kimberley: Australia's Wild West
programs.desc: Bask in the largest intact savannah on the planet, where mammals and insects fly through the air with the greatest of ease. Study traditional wildfire-management methods, explore a sandstone refuge, and watch a sugar glider try to escape the flames.

director: Nick Robinson: Director, Mark Coles Smith: Narrator

programs.title: Coral City
programs.desc: Feel the heat of summer’s arrival as supersize sea snails try to fend off an invading gang of coral-hungry starfish. Accompany reef sharks as they prowl for a midnight meal and marvel at the slippery disguise a parrotfish uses to survive the night.

director: Craig Meade, Alan Erson: Executive Producers, Siddharth Nambiar: Director

programs.title: Deep Dive North America
programs.desc: Marvel at North America’s natural wonders as Lizzie swims through astonishing coral reefs, digs for ancient fossils, and treks through jungles on tropical shores. Prowl with jaguars that stalk a Costa Rican beach and meet the planet’s biggest sharks.

director: Presenter: Lizzie Daly, Director: Mark Woodward, Executive Producer: Emma Ross

programs.title: Deep Dive North America
programs.desc: Tag along with Lizzie on her most dangerous Atlantic adventure yet: free diving with bull sharks. Explore otherworldly Gulf Coast swamps filled with hungry alligators, crafty snapping turtles, and tiny but mighty beach mice who strengthen sand dunes.

director: Presenter: Lizzie Daly, Director: Mark Woodward, Executive Producer: Emma Ross

programs.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programs.desc: Crash a fruit-flinging party celebrating the return of Jelapat, Talaken, Bawan, and Rona to the nursery to join the rest of their classmates. Meanwhile, flooding overtakes the pre-release islands, and injuries stifle the progress of two students.

programs.title: Wild Birds of Australia
programs.desc: Follow the story of Harry and Sally, a pair of little penguins. These flightless, flippered birds create some of the noisiest neighborhoods in nature. Theirs is a family saga of faithful relationships, committed homemaking, and vigorous nightlife.
